---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work, including example commands if relevant:

```bash
pub search "..." --your-new-flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why this one is preferred.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
